current_state: Haven't left bed all day, skipped meals
scheduled_activity: 5-minute walk around the block
notes: Felt better than expected. Sunlight helped.

scheduled_activity: Reply to 3 simple emails only
notes: Easier than anticipated. Momentum built.

current_state: Haven't spoken to anyone in 3 days
scheduled_activity: Text one friend: 'How are you?'
notes: Friend responded warmly. Conversation flowed easily.

current_state: Room is messy, haven't showered in 2 days
scheduled_activity: Take a 10-minute shower
barrier_solutions: One small step at a time
notes: Felt human again. Fresh clothes helped mood.

current_state: Snapping at family, can't sit still
scheduled_activity: 10-minute mindfulness meditation
notes: Calmed down significantly. Less reactive.

current_state: Going through motions, nothing feels real
scheduled_activity: Make and savor a cup of tea
notes: Tasted the tea more than expected. Small comfort.

current_state: Haven't exercised in weeks, feeling guilty
scheduled_activity: 5 gentle stretches
barrier_solutions: Focus on how body feels, not looks
notes: Body felt grateful. No judgment needed.

current_state: Kitchen is piled with dishes, can't start
scheduled_activity: Wash 3 dishes only
notes: Ended up doing 10. Stopped when I wanted to, not when overwhelmed.

scheduled_activity: Write 3 things I did today
barrier_solutions: Include basic things: ate, breathed, existed
notes: Wrote: 'Fed cat, drank water, texted sister.' Small but real.

current_state: Stuck in worry loop about future
scheduled_activity: Color in coloring book for 15 minutes
barrier_solutions: This IS productive for mental health
notes: Lost track of time. Mind quieted down.

current_state: Haven't cooked in weeks, eating cereal
scheduled_activity: Make a simple sandwich
notes: Tasted good. Felt like caring for myself.

current_state: Avoiding social media, feeling left out
avoidance_behavior: Hiding from world, not reaching out
scheduled_activity: Call a family member for 10 minutes
barriers: Don't know what to talk about
barrier_solutions: They want to hear from me
notes: Mom was happy to hear from me. Felt connected.

current_state: Haven't worked on hobby in months
scheduled_activity: Spend 15 minutes on hobby project
notes: Remembered why I loved this. Skill came back.

current_state: Shoulders tight, jaw clenched all day
avoidance_behavior: Taking painkillers instead of addressing stress
scheduled_activity: Progressive muscle relaxation - 10 min
notes: Body released tension. Felt lighter afterward.

avoidance_behavior: Refusing to make plans or set goals
scheduled_activity: Plan one small activity for tomorrow
notes: Planned to get coffee tomorrow. Something to look forward to.

avoidance_behavior: Avoiding laundry, buying new underwear instead
scheduled_activity: Put one load of laundry in machine
notes: Fresh clothes felt like self-care. Confidence boost.

current_state: Haven't learned anything new in months
scheduled_activity: Read 5 pages of a book
notes: Got absorbed in story. Read 10 pages instead.

avoidance_behavior: Using other bathroom or waiting until last minute
scheduled_activity: Clean bathroom counter only
notes: Counter looks great. Motivation to do sink tomorrow.

current_state: Sedentary all day, stiff and achy
avoidance_behavior: Ignoring body signals, pushing through pain
scheduled_activity: 5-minute yoga stretch video
barrier_solutions: Do it in bed or chair
notes: Body felt awake. Less stiffness in neck.

scheduled_activity: Open and sort mail for 10 minutes
notes: Most was junk mail. Only 2 bills. Less scary than imagined.

scheduled_activity: Attend one social event for 30 minutes
barrier_solutions: Set time limit, can leave after
notes: Stayed 45 min. Met someone with shared interest.

current_state: Haven't dated in years, given up
scheduled_activity: Create dating profile (just write, don't post)
barriers: No one will match with me
notes: Writing about myself was hard but clarifying. Might actually post it.

avoidance_behavior: Waiting for others to reach out
scheduled_activity: Invite one friend for coffee
barrier_solutions: Rejection is about them, not me
notes: Friend was delighted I asked. Said they'd been thinking of me too.

avoidance_behavior: Staying home to avoid social judgment
scheduled_activity: Make small talk with cashier
barrier_solutions: Just comment on weather or item
notes: Cashier smiled. Conversation was brief but positive.

scheduled_activity: Send a thinking-of-you text to family member
barrier_solutions: No need to address issues yet
notes: Mom responded with heart emoji. Door is open for more contact.

scheduled_activity: Join colleagues for lunch once this week
notes: Learned interesting things about coworkers. Felt more connected.

scheduled_activity: Attend one community event or class
barrier_solutions: Everyone is there to meet people
notes: Joined a book club. People were welcoming. Have next meeting to attend.

avoidance_behavior: Avoiding romantic content, closing off heart
scheduled_activity: Write qualities I want in a partner
barrier_solutions: Knowing what I want is empowering
notes: Realized I have clear standards. Feel more intentional about dating.

scheduled_activity: Call a friend instead of scrolling
barriers: Don't know what to talk about
notes: Friend appreciated the call. Felt real instead of performative.

current_state: Caring for sick parent, no time for self
scheduled_activity: Ask friend to sit with parent for 1 hour
barrier_solutions: Friends want to help but don't know how
Frame it as social visit for parent
notes: Friend was happy to help. Used time for walk. Feel recharged.

scheduled_activity: Update resume for 20 minutes
barrier_solutions: Safety isn't the same as fulfillment
notes: Realized I have more skills than I thought. Feel more confident.

avoidance_behavior: Consuming others' art instead of making own
scheduled_activity: Create one small thing (sketch, poem, photo)
notes: Drew a simple sketch. Wasn't masterpiece but felt good to create.

scheduled_activity: Attend one spiritual service or meditation
barriers: Don't believe like I used to
barrier_solutions: Spirituality is a practice, not perfection
notes: Felt peaceful. Remembered why this mattered to me before.

scheduled_activity: One small environmental action (recycle, plant)
barrier_solutions: Focus on what I can control
notes: Planted herb seeds. Small act of hope. Feel less helpless.

current_state: Haven't exercised in months, weight gain
scheduled_activity: 10-minute walk in nature
notes: Saw birds, felt sun. Body moved without pain. Want to do again.

current_state: Don't know account balance, avoiding reality
scheduled_activity: Check bank balance and categorize spending
barriers: Fear of how bad it is
notes: Not as bad as feared. Now I know where I stand. Can make plan.

current_state: Want to learn new skill but overwhelmed
scheduled_activity: Watch one lesson of online course
notes: Learned something new. Brain felt engaged. Want to continue.

current_state: Want to help others but too drained
avoidance_behavior: Saying 'I should volunteer' but not doing it
scheduled_activity: One small act of kindness for stranger
notes: Helped elderly neighbor with groceries. Felt connected and useful.

avoidance_behavior: Spending time elsewhere or in bed
scheduled_activity: Add one thing that brings joy to space (plant, photo)
notes: Put fresh flowers on table. Room feels more alive. I smile seeing them.

avoidance_behavior: Saying 'I have no hobbies' and giving up
scheduled_activity: Try one new activity (borrow supplies if needed)
notes: Tried watercolor painting. Was messy but fun. Want to try again.

avoidance_behavior: Silent treatment, sleeping in separate room
scheduled_activity: Write apology note or initiate conversation
notes: Partner appreciated initiative. We talked and reconnected.

current_state: Thinking about past mistake for hours
scheduled_activity: Physical movement when rumination starts
notes: Walked around block. Broke rumination cycle. Felt more grounded.

scheduled_activity: Work on task for just 5 minutes
barrier_solutions: First draft doesn't need to be perfect
notes: Once started, worked for 30 min. Task less scary than imagined.

avoidance_behavior: Saying 'I'll do it when I feel better'
scheduled_activity: Act 'as if' - do activity despite mood
barrier_solutions: Mood follows action, not vice versa
Fake it till you make it works
notes: Didn't feel like dancing but did it anyway. Actually smiled.

current_state: Can't start because conditions aren't perfect
scheduled_activity: Do task imperfectly - 'good enough' standard
notes: Submitted work that was 'good enough'. Relief and pride.

scheduled_activity: Establish calming bedtime routine
notes: Read book instead of scrolling. Fell asleep easier. Woke more rested.

avoidance_behavior: Staying in bed until last minute
scheduled_activity: Create morning routine worth waking for
notes: Made nice coffee and sat in sun. Morning felt less hostile.

scheduled_activity: Plan one structured activity for weekend
barriers: No one to do it with
notes: Went to farmers market alone. Enjoyed people watching. Bought fresh bread.

current_state: Exhausted after work, no evening energy
scheduled_activity: One small productive thing before relaxing
notes: Unloaded dishwasher. Then relaxed guilt-free. Felt balanced.

scheduled_activity: Schedule 'guilt-free' relaxation time
notes: Read novel for an hour without guilt. Actually felt restored.

current_state: Good week, want to maintain momentum
scheduled_activity: Continue daily routine even on good days
notes: Kept routine even on good day. Mood stayed stable. Building habit.

scheduled_activity: Review activity log and increase scheduling
notes: Noticed I'd dropped social activities. Added one back. Caught it early.

current_state: Missed activities for 3 days, feeling defeated
avoidance_behavior: Giving up, 'I knew I couldn't stick with it'
scheduled_activity: Restart with smaller activity today
notes: Did 5 min stretch. Broke the 'giving up' cycle. Back on track.

scheduled_activity: Light therapy + walk at noon
notes: Sunlight helped even on cold day. Felt more awake.

avoidance_behavior: Falling back into old avoidance patterns
scheduled_activity: Establish one anchor routine in new situation
notes: Kept coffee ritual from old routine. Anchor helped stability.

scheduled_activity: Reduce activity intensity, keep consistency
notes: Did gentle version of usual activity. Honored body's needs.

current_state: Recently lost loved one, functioning impaired
scheduled_activity: One small meaningful ritual or memorial activity
notes: Lit candle for mom. Cried but felt connected. Part of healing.

scheduled_activity: Gentle modified activity within pain limits
notes: Gentle stretching from chair. Less stiffness. Felt less trapped.

scheduled_activity: Plan next small enjoyable thing
notes: Planned weekend hike. Having something to look forward to helped.

current_state: Month of consistent activities, mood improved
scheduled_activity: Review progress and set new goals
notes: Reviewed log - 80% completion rate! Proud of progress. Set new goals.
